title: The Wools!
description: This mod adds some practical wool recipes.
body:
🍞-ABOUT-🍞

Are you still distressed that you need wool but can't find a sheep alive? Never mind! This mod adds some practical wool formulas, so that you no longer have to work for wool~

🌭-Approximate content-🌭

This mod adds some tools and blocks that allow you to extract plant fibers from plants and process them into wool!Such as Sugar Cane,Wheat and Weeping Vines.

🍿-Q&A-🍿

Q:Is it compatible with each other? A:This mod is compatible with materials from other mods and will work as long as it has the corresponding label (e.g. "minecraft:logs" "minecraft:planks"). Q:Made with Mcreator? A:This mod does not cause poor quality due to MCreator. Q:Can I add it to my mod pack? A:Of course. Q:Can you make a Fabric version for it? A:Because of the limitations of my own technology, I will not consider it.However, you can try to migrate it to other versions yourself, provided you comply with GPLv3.
